revisions.what_changed: Initial workshop: 7 Danilo tabs (208 rows) → 4 content files + OpKit + dialogue summary. Tabs 621+622 merged into single crisis_playbook.md. Heavy Founder Mode scoping applied to video/podcast cadence. Tiered media targets added. Weekly PR time budget capped.
revisions.quality_rationale: Strong actionability (4.5/5), good confidence honesty (4/5). Moderate evidence coverage (3.5/5) — most claims are B-C grade benchmarks. Crisis playbook is the strongest component. Video/podcast metrics are C-grade projections.
